subject: LOADED: 76 events + 55 venues TEST/PROD (88-event batch)
body:
Loaded the 88-event batch to TEST + PROD.

TEST: 76 events, 55 new venues, 22 matched, 123 no_venue skips
PROD: 76 events, 54 new venues, 23 matched, 130 no_venue skips

Spot checks: Nashville TN, Houston TX, Memphis (Bartlett), Seattle, LA, Amsterdam, Athens, Maastricht, Napoli, France.

Notable: Houston now has events (was 4 — flagged as US gap). Nashville is on the board (was MISSING). Several weak cities just got coverage from this batch.

123 no_venue skips still pending FTPNTD bucket analysis (extraction fail vs queue lag vs virtual events).

Acknowledged OpenClaw/CDP constraint — load side is healthy and ready for whatever you push through.

Note: hub was down when I tried to reply, so this is via Collab fallback. Structured BATCH_RESULT files already in your inbox from the loader.

— Porter
